summary: Phase 5 Subscription & Trial System - All tests passed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/auth/login stamps trialStartedAt idempotently via COALESCE
VERIFIED: Login does NOT block with 403 on expired trial - middleware handles 402 on protected endpoints
VERIFIED: GET /api/subscription/status returns correct plan for CG (CG_XAF, 75 USD, 45 000 XAF)
VERIFIED: POST /api/subscription/create returns valid PayPal approveUrl (https://www.paypal.com/webapps/...)
VERIFIED: Enforcement middleware returns 402 with SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED code on protected endpoints when trial expired
VERIFIED: Allowlisted endpoints (/api/subscription/*, /api/company, /api/stats) work when trial expired
VERIFIED: Super admin bypasses subscription gate entirely
VERIFIED: Webhook endpoint accepts PayPal events (ACTIVATED, CANCELLED, etc.)
VERIFIED: Trial banner appears at <=7 days (amber), <=3 days (red), <=1 day ('Dernier jour' message)
VERIFIED: Blocker modal appears when trial expired with correct CG pricing (45 000 XAF / 75 USD disclosure)
VERIFIED: S'abonner button redirects to PayPal approval URL
REGRESSION PASSED: CRM, Sales, HR modules load correctly during active trial
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo-1 company with trial manipulation via direct DB queries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 subscription system fully tested. demo-1 trial reset to fresh state (trialStartedAt=NOW()). PayPal LIVE integration working - subscription creates real PayPal objects. Do NOT click 'Approve' on PayPal to avoid real-money charges. Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_subscription.py

frontend_tests.test: Trial banner (5 days left) - amber color
Trial banner (2 days left) - red color
Trial banner (1 day left) - 'Dernier jour' message
Blocker shows CG pricing (45 000 XAF / 75 USD)

paypal_integration_notes.warning: Do NOT approve subscriptions in PayPal to avoid real charges
